meaning: n.肥皂水,泡沫,<美俚>啤酒vt.在肥皂水中洗vi.形成起泡肥皂水  不明原因瘁死综合症 SUDS(sudden unexplained death syndrome)
examples: He had soap suds in his ears.
She was up to her elbows in suds.
Feel the suds slipping down your body.
The Light Group sold 2 bottles of these expensive suds over the past 12 months.
Realistically, Molson Coors will be primarily a North American seller of suds for the foreseeable future.
